Courses.title: Guitar for Beginners
Courses.description: Learn the basics of playing the guitar, including chords, strumming patterns, and simple songs.

Courses.title: Piano Masterclass
Courses.description: Master the piano with this comprehensive course covering technique, theory, and performance.

Courses.title: Drumming Essentials
Courses.description: Get started with drumming by learning basic rhythms, techniques, and popular beats.

Courses.title: Vocal Training
Courses.description: Improve your singing skills with vocal exercises, breathing techniques, and performance tips.

Courses.title: Music Theory Fundamentals
Courses.description: Understand the basics of music theory, including scales, chords, and harmony.
